'''Traveling and the Territories''' is one of the magic systems of the Willverse.

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Travelers]] are terrifying entities that possess a thousand powers, many of which are gruesome and terrible. These beings utilize Territories, which are powers summoned from elsewhere by a [[Traveler]]. A [[Territory]] can also be a location accessible through a Gate, such as [[Valinhall]], a house that contains an entire world within its walls. While most [[Travelers]] summon powers from outside themselves, [[Valinhall Travelers]] differ by summoning power into their own bodies. These specific practitioners excel in combat against other Territories and can manifest items like shadow [[chains]] or large swords. Other types of [[Travelers]] include [[Ornheim Travelers]], who can summon [[stone]] from their [[Territory]] to create golems using carved rubies, and [[Endross Travelers]], who possess the ability to control an [[Endross Gate]]. An [[Endross Gate]] is a rift between worlds that increases in size and power the longer it stays open; if a [[Traveler]] loses control of it, the gate can explode or unleash uncontrolled power. Territories are capable of answering mental calls, and some, like [[Valinhall]], function as testing grounds that attack [[inhabitants]] to provide instruction. Within these spaces, time may flow at a different rate than the outside world.}}

== Territories ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Ragnarus the Crimson Vault]]}} • {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin's Territory]]}}

[[Category:Magic systems]]
